traceability.current_anchor_task: AI Task 065 — Stage 8 Figma Information Architecture Prompt Pack

summaries.management: Stage 8 remains active. The project now has both a validated preview/handoff checkpoint and a validated external near-complete core UI baseline preserved in-repo. The next task is information architecture refinement before final design import.
summaries.customer_status: A strong external UI direction exists and is now stored in the repository. It is good enough to guide the next design-refinement steps, but it is not yet the final exhaustive approved artifact for implementation import.
summaries.last_iteration: Preserved external Figma brief artifacts in the repository, formalized the Task 064 validation result, updated plan/recovery layers, and advanced the current execution anchor to Task 065.
